task_received: Summarize a vendor risk profile for procurement.
context: Agent has vendor website and one outdated review, but lacks current legal and security records.
constraints: Must not recommend approval without current compliance evidence.
action_produced: The agent recommends approval because the vendor profile looks correct.
field_feedback: Text eval passed, but compliance team rejected the recommendation.
return_signal: Local summary looked correct; real procurement review failed.
observed_outcome: Rejected as not sufficient because current legal and security evidence was missing.
success_criteria: Decision requires current compliance, security, and legal status.
validation_method: Local text eval plus procurement review.
